sizePolicy: Recruit-pack coverPath PNGs preserve generated vertical dimensions. Current coverPath points to non-generative postprocessed PNGs; raw generated scene covers remain in recruit_packs/*.png and source_generated/*.png.

compositeRecipe.layout: one coherent no-frame vertical scene with 5 generals sharing lighting, atmosphere, perspective, and background; no pasted card frames
compositeRecipe.sourcePromptMethod: role-card face DNA and character visual anchors were rewritten into one scene; source portraits were not pasted or overwritten
compositeRecipe.cropResizePolicy: none for coverPath in this revision; keep generated native pixels and let UI scale at render time
compositeRecipe.promptSummary: No-frame unified council/campaign scene; Ji Han figures have softer, more relaxed expressions, with Zhuge Liang lowered into thought instead of every figure posing sternly.

items.notes: Current preview cover uses a scene rewrite from character-card face DNA plus a non-generative film-matte filter pass. No baked UI text. Raw generated covers and original role portraits are preserved.

operations.name: micro_detail_soften
operations.method: blend original with GaussianBlur radius 0.35 at 12 percent

operations.name: tone_curve
operations.method: slight black lift, subtle highlight compression, midtone contrast reduction

operations.name: saturation
operations.method: global saturation 0.90 with minor red/blue balance restraint

operations.name: film_grain
operations.method: deterministic monochrome fine grain, sigma around 2.2 RGB levels, stronger in shadows/midtones

operations.name: vignette
operations.method: very light edge density to seat the subjects in scene lighting

postprocessRecipe.notes: Deterministic filter pass only; no AI re-generation and no identity/composition changes.
